# Beema Health

> Beema Health is a US telehealth medical weight-loss service. Licensed providers evaluate patients online and, when clinically appropriate, prescribe GLP-1 medications — Zepbound® (tirzepatide), Wegovy® (semaglutide, injection and oral), and compounded semaglutide and tirzepatide — with transparent cash pricing, US pharmacy fulfillment, and ongoing follow-up care.

Key facts:

- Care model: online eligibility check → medical intake questionnaire → review by a licensed provider → prescription when clinically appropriate → home delivery from US pharmacies → ongoing check-ins and refill management.
- Medications: Zepbound® (tirzepatide), Wegovy® (semaglutide injection), Wegovy® oral semaglutide, and compounded semaglutide/tirzepatide. Compounded semaglutide/tirzepatide is not FDA-approved and is only offered when clinically indicated.
- Prescriptions are never guaranteed; a licensed provider makes every prescribing decision.
- Pricing is transparent cash-pay — no hidden fees. $99 for first month of Semaglutide, $199 every month after. $197 for first month of tirzepatide, $297 every month after. 
- Privacy: Full HIPAA compliance for all patient information.

## Main pages

- [Home](https://beemahealth.com/): what Beema Health is and how care works
- [Weight-loss treatments](https://beemahealth.com/weight-loss/): the medication lineup and who each is for
- [How it works](https://beemahealth.com/how-it-works/): step-by-step care process
- [Safety](https://beemahealth.com/safety/): side effects, contraindications, and clinical safeguards
- [FAQ](https://beemahealth.com/faq/): common questions about eligibility, medications, shipping, and refills
- [About](https://beemahealth.com/about/): company and clinical team
- [Contact](https://beemahealth.com/contact/): support channels
